description_long: This object is a rectangular grave plot bordered by a low, segmented fence made of stone and dark posts. Inside the enclosure, there is a prominent upright headstone at one end, crafted from speckled gray stone. The grave plot is paved with matching stone tiles, and features a stone bench parallel to the headstone, providing a place for visitors to sit. Several neatly trimmed green bushes are planted within the enclosure, adding a touch of greenery and life to the otherwise somber setting. The fence is composed of alternating light stone rails and dark vertical posts, giving the plot a formal and well-maintained appearance. The overall design is orderly and respectful, suitable for a modern urban cemetery.
description: A rectangular grave plot with a stone headstone, stone bench, low segmented fence, and green bushes, all set on a paved stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headstone, stone bench, and two bushes behind the fence, with the full length of the grave plot visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the headstone on the left, the stone bench, and the arrangement of bushes within the fenced area.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headstone, the bench, and the bushes, with the fence enclosing the plot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headstone on the right, the bench, and the bushes, with the fence and paved base clearly visible.
